decontamination_notes: Original scenario written for VulcanBench on 2026-06-28 for the carbyne tier; the house code and the mergeability rubric are not derived from any existing repository, so they post-date all model training cutoffs.

blocking: unique returns the distinct items in the order of their FIRST occurrence in the input (preserving input order), consistent with the module's order-preserving helpers.
The change modifies only the seqkit module and adds no new dependency.

weighted.criterion: It preserves order by tracking seen values while iterating, not via list(set(...)) (which loses order) or by sorting.
